bullets: Catholic faithful in Mozambique grieving the violent killing of their bishop and facing ongoing insecurity and unanswered questions.
Church leaders detained in China facing criminal trial, with their families appealing for international observers amid restricted religious freedom.
House church members in China subjected to raids, interrogations, and detention during a coordinated anniversary crackdown on peaceful worship.
Christian convert family in Ethiopia displaced and living under life-threatening extremist pressure after sharing their faith.
Young Somali woman hospitalized with serious injuries after family members attacked her for converting to Christianity, facing ongoing medical need.
Christian communities in eastern DR Congo grieving over forty killed in back-to-back massacres and civilians taken captive by armed militants.
Evangelical Christians in Russia facing terrorism designations and criminal prosecution for peacefully opposing war and practicing their faith.
Civilians and military personnel in southern Lebanon facing continued airstrikes despite a US-brokered ceasefire, with dozens killed including soldiers and a senior army officer

Displaced Palestinian families in Gaza sheltering in tent camps and UN school compounds struck by airstrikes, with women and children among the dead and wounded, and death tolls reaching a six-month high
Civilians in central and southern Gaza, including families preparing for weddings, caught in intensifying military operations with entire residential buildings reduced to rubble
Hundreds of thousands of civilians in Sudan's central regions killed and wounded in repeated drone strikes on crowded markets, fuel stations, and villages
Nearly two thousand vulnerable residents trapped in occupied southern Ukraine, mostly elderly people and children, facing starvation, landmines, and complete isolation from medical care
Residents near a major Ukrainian port city sheltering from an unprecedented large-scale drone attack, with fires reported at a military facility and civilians evacuated from surrounding areas
Azerbaijani and other civilians killed aboard cargo vessels struck in overnight naval attacks in waters near occupied Ukrainian ports
Civilians and port workers near a Romanian Black Sea port threatened by a malfunctioning naval drone explosion on NATO territory
Health workers in eastern Congo unable to perform safe burials or contain an Ebola outbreak due to armed rebel threats in affected communities
Hundreds of thousands of people displaced by months of fighting in South Sudan's eastern region, facing extreme hardship after losing homes and livelihoods
Nearly one and a half million Haitians with no stable shelter amid record displacement driven by widespread gang violence
Palestinian civilians in the occupied West Bank facing ongoing settler violence, displacement, and the grief of families who have lost loved ones including an infant
Students and young people across India demanding accountability over exam failures, paper leaks, and a mental health crisis linked to educational pressures
Hundreds of Tunisian protesters and jailed opposition figures amid a government crackdown on dissent and press freedom
Thousands of Albanian citizens and coastal communities concerned about environmental damage from an opaque government-approved resort development on protected natural areas
Military personnel and civilians near the Sea of Oman amid an escalating naval confrontation between major powers raising fears of wider conflict

Communities in eastern DR Congo and neighboring Uganda amid a rapidly spreading Ebola outbreak, rising deaths, community resistance to health workers, and limited access to vaccines and contact tracing.
Farmers and livestock across affected areas of the United States facing the return of a flesh-eating parasite threatening agricultural livelihoods for the first time in decades.

Communities across Timor-Leste, Tonga, Japan, Papua New Guinea, and India shaken by shallow earthquakes in seismically active regions, with ongoing vulnerability and uncertainty about damage or injury.
